\tzpentry{ID5804}{Vortex Stress-Energy Tensor}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5804 introduces Vortex Stress-Energy Tensor as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{V}_{\text{vortex}}[r,\theta] = \Module\left[\begin{aligned} &\{g_{\mu\nu}^{\text{Kerr}}, T_{\mu\nu\lambda}^{\text{torsion}}, \mathcal{H}_{\text{ergosphere}}\}, \\ &g_{\mu\nu}^{\text{Kerr}} = \eta_{\mu\nu} + h_{\mu\nu}^{\text{rotation}}[a, M]; \\ &T_{\mu\nu\lambda} = \Gamma_{\mu\nu\lambda} - \Gamma_{\nu\mu\lambda} + \frac{\kappa}{2}S_{\mu\nu} \wedge e_\lambda; \\ &\mathcal{H}_{\text{ergosphere}} = \{r: g_{tt} + 2g_{t\phi}\Omega + g_{\phi\phi}\Omega^2 = 0\} \end{aligned}\right] \end{equation}
